message:
test: Add reproduction test and e2e fixtures

Expand test infrastructure:

- Add repro_bug test for issue reproduction
- Add e2e fixtures for config pane exclusion testing
- Add dummy ignored pane script fixture
- Sync beads issue tracking state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+# E2E test configuration for pane exclude filter testing
+# Extends baseline with exclude rules that match "IGNORED_PANE" title
+
+[ingest]
+poll_interval_ms = 100
+batch_size = 50
+max_segment_bytes = 65536
+
+# Pane filtering: exclude panes with "IGNORED_PANE" in title
+[ingest.panes]
+[[ingest.panes.exclude]]
+id = "exclude_ignored_title"
+title = "IGNORED_PANE"
+
+[storage]
+retention_days = 1
+vacuum_interval_hours = 24
+
+[search]
+snippet_context_chars = 80
+max_results = 1000
+
+[patterns]
+pack_dirs = ["fixtures/e2e/patterns"]
+
+[workflows]
+max_concurrent = 5
+default_timeout_secs = 60
+
+[safety]
+block_alt_screen = false
+require_confirmation = false
+audit_all_actions = true
+
+[safety.actors.robot]
+send_text = true
+send_keys = true
+split_pane = true
+close_pane = false
+
+[safety.actors.workflow]
+send_text = true
+send_keys = true
+split_pane = true
+close_pane = false
+
+[logging]
+level = "debug"
+format = "json"

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# Dummy script for IGNORED pane in E2E exclude filter test
+# Sets pane title to "IGNORED_PANE" (matching exclude rule) and prints SECRET_TOKEN
+#
+# Usage: ./dummy_ignored_pane.sh [SECRET_TOKEN] [COUNT]
+#
+# Arguments:
+#   SECRET_TOKEN - Secret string that should NEVER appear in wa artifacts (default: SECRET_TOKEN_<timestamp>)
+#   COUNT        - Number of lines to print (default: 50)
+#
+# The pane title "IGNORED_PANE" matches the exclude rule in config_pane_exclude.toml,
+# so wa should NOT capture any output from this pane.
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SECRET_TOKEN="${1:-SECRET_TOKEN_$(date +%s)}"
+COUNT="${2:-50}"
+
+# Set WezTerm pane title to match exclude rule
+# Uses OSC 0 (icon + title) and OSC 2 (title only) escape sequences
+printf '\033]0;IGNORED_PANE\007'
+printf '\033]2;IGNORED_PANE\007'
+
+echo "=== IGNORED Pane (Should NOT Be Captured) ==="
+echo "Title: IGNORED_PANE"
+echo "Secret Token: $SECRET_TOKEN"
+echo ""
+
+for i in $(seq 1 "$COUNT"); do
+    echo "Ignored Line $i: $SECRET_TOKEN - $(date +%H:%M:%S.%N)"
+    sleep 0.02
+done
+
+echo ""
+echo "Done (ignored): $SECRET_TOKEN"
+echo "Total lines: $COUNT"
+
+# Keep the pane alive for testing
+echo "Pane will stay open for inspection..."
+sleep 300
